rationale: Review 1's sole finding (the thin public wrapper lemma at line 65 restating mul_antipode_rTensor_comul_apply) is real but a trivial nit whose fix (inline or private) is neither required by reuse nor something maintainers would insist on; both reviews correctly conclude the PR reuses the bialgebra convolution monoid and adds only new Group/mapValue material with no overlap.
